title: `VERB_EXPORT` Macro Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step task plan to implement a C++17 VERB_EXPORT macro in runtime/verb.h for exposing C++ functions to Verb imports.
notes: This is a task-by-task implementation plan (checkbox steps, code diffs, commit instructions) rather than a pure ADR/PRD/SPEC. It contains technical-constraint-like content (supported types, arity limits, header-only rule) similar to a SPEC, but its dominant structure is an execution plan referencing a separate design/spec doc ('Full design rationale: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-20-verb-export-macro-design.md'). Classified as DOC (context/plan) since the authoritative technical spec lives elsewhere; synthesizer may want to treat the 'Global Constraints' section as technical-constraint context to cross-check against the linked design spec.
